name: plea-bargain
topic: plea bargain negotiation between prosecutor and defense

rubrics: Facts should cover the negotiation structure and the information asymmetry between prosecutor and defense.
Facts should include the relevant fallback positions or sentencing stakes.
Facts should avoid drifting into criminal-justice reform or legal philosophy.
Every player entity should be a genuine actor with independent agency in the situation.
Each player should have at least one objective that is specific to their position in this scenario.
Do not invent players not implied by the prompt — if the prompt describes two parties, there should be two players unless a third party is clearly relevant.
